flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kirkwood Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.3k → $6.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kirkwood Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $8.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kirkwood Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Kirkwood Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (64.5% → 71.1%).
